identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.

theme.name: Digital Clay
theme.description: A warm, trustworthy, and grounded aesthetic that combines the reliability of earth tones with the precision of modern fintech. It evokes the wisdom of 'Chanakya' and the comfort of a 'Mantra'.

headings.usage: All page titles, section headers, and feature names. Use tight tracking.

body.usage: All paragraphs, data tables, inputs, and labels. Excellent for numbers.

mono.usage: Code snippets, API keys, or technical data if any.

primary.description: Burnt Orange / Terracotta. Use for primary CTAs, active states, and key brand moments.

secondary.description: Deep Obsidian / Slate 900. Use for secondary buttons, footer, and strong contrast elements.

background.description: Warm Off-White. Avoid clinical pure white #ffffff for the main background. Use #fffaf5 to give a 'paper' feel.

text.description: Warm Greys (Stone). Never use pure black.

spacing.scale: Generous. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-0.5 font-semibold px-8 py-3 rounded-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-secondary border-2 border-secondary/10 hover:border-secondary/30 hover:bg-secondary/5 transition-all duration-300 font-medium px-8 py-3 rounded-lg

cards.classes: bg-white border border-stone-100 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-shadow duration-300 rounded-2xl p-6

inputs.classes: bg-white border-stone-200 focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-md h-12 px-4 transition-all duration-200

chat_interface.container: bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 shadow-2xl rounded-3xl overflow-hidden
chat_interface.bubble_user: bg-primary text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-6 py-3 shadow-md max-w-[80%]
chat_interface.bubble_ai: bg-white border border-stone-100 text-stone-800 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-6 py-3 shadow-sm max-w-[80%]

visual_enhancers.gradients: Use subtle noise textures over solid colors instead of linear gradients.
visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: All interactive elements must have hover/active states. Use 'transform hover:-translate-y-1' for cards.

landing_hero.alt: Happy Indian family enjoying financial freedom
landing_hero.usage: Hero section background or main visual

feature_budget.alt: Young professional managing finances on laptop

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts immediately.
2. UPDATE TAILWIND CONFIG: Replace the default colors with the 'Digital Clay' palette defined above.
3. REFACTOR CSS: Move custom styles from App.css to Tailwind utility classes or components.
4. IMPLEMENT LAYOUTS: Use the 'Bento Grid' for the dashboard. Avoid simple rows.
5. ENHANCE CHATBOT: Build the 'Chanakya' interface with distinct, high-quality message bubbles and a clean input area.
6. APPLY TEXTURE: Add a subtle noise texture to the background to avoid the 'flat digital' look.
7. MOBILE FIRST: Ensure all grids collapse to 1 column on mobile.
8. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetic (generic centered layouts, gradients).
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
DO NOT apply universal transition (transition: all).
DO NOT center align the app container.
Use modern button styles (pill-shaped or sharp).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
